title: Sivakornchong.github.io
text:
Hi everyone! My name is Sivakorn Chongfeungprinya. That is a long name, so please just call me Oak. I came from Singapore/ Thailand!
I was born in Thailand but I have lived in Singapore for around half of my life.
I am interested to learn more about the technicality of data science to build a stronger foundation towards success in this field.
And yes~ Anyone interested to hike around Vancouver, let me know.

title: About
text: This site will soon be populated as Oak’s online resume.
